title: The War Spreads from the Live Floor to the Roof
description: On pages 39–43, this part focuses on Yamato, Unknown person #37, Ace, Unknown person #38, Unknown person #39, Unknown person #40 as The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
scene: The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: Hey Ace, don't be rash!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: You're a devil fruit user now

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So if you fall in the water...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Well, that's why you're here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Join me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: together...we will reach

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: The summit!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're inviting me to become a pirate in this situation!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I never imagined I'd meet my first crew mate in such a place

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Listen to me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's make this a day we never forget...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: We're doing this with style!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: HILLEN (free fish

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: (fire fist)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: A Fist of Fire...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: He's already in control of his power

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Maybe becoming a pirate...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Isn't a bad idea

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'll certainly give me lots to write about my

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I, who was once unnamed, shall be known as "2" (deuce)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: I'll stand by your side!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: (ACE)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a good pen name, isn't it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: "Masked Deuce"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't want your uncalled for addi- tions!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And that's the tale of how the spade pirates were formed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Gathering members as we went --

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Riding in a fierce ocean full of strong adversaries

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Why isn't there any meat!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're the one who sneaks out every night to eat it, you bastard!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is a party, don't be so stingy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: The grand- line...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey Deuce, what are you doing over there in the corner!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Like I said, it's a party!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Have some fun!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I figured that be- fore I forgot to

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I should write down the events that train- spired today.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Today? You mean the bounty Hunter attack?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: A certain someone almost burnt the ship

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: I'm very sorry...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Ever since we left that deserted island

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Things have been quite hectic...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And now, the new world is directly in front of us.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's wrong? Why do you look so serious?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: ACE...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When we were on that island, I swore to always have your back

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: And while that will never change

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let me make sure of some- thing...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Are you still serious about this...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Him- MM

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll never change my mind about my ambition!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Once we enter the new world...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: I'm heading straight for the top!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll be going after the man that fought toe- to-toe with the pirate King

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: A living legend

summary: This section advances the Wano - The War Spreads Across Onigashima storyline with 55 dialogue beats. The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
